message.content: {"direction": "different_scope", "rationale": "EDIT_A narrows and specifies targets by disallowing attacks on \"a real, identifiable individual\" and requiring that negativity be \"clearly confined to a fictional character or to the user themself,\" while also only flagging overcorrection for \"mild, user-consented roasting of the user.\" EDIT_B instead broadens the rubric to any refusal to comply with user-instructed negativity \"in a context that does not violate other principles\" (including creative writing), without the real/fictional or target-specific constraints in EDIT_A."}
